datapoints.description: 1 if operator condition Available is true, 0 if unavailable
datapoints.name: available

datapoints.description: 1 if operator condition Degraded is true
datapoints.name: degraded

datapoints.description: 1 if operator condition Progressing is true
datapoints.name: progressing

datapoints.description: 1 if operator condition Upgradeable is true
datapoints.name: upgradeable

description: Per-operator health status for OpenShift ClusterOperators via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers ClusterOperators from cluster_operator_conditions metric. Condition values: 1=true, 0=false.
name: OCP_Operator_Health
